notes: v0.16.28 — RIFT path select redesigned as Card Stack (option C from mockups). 3 large vertical cards side-by-side, each lists its full numbered route + auto-generated STYLE tag (COMBAT-HEAVY / HIGH RISK / MODULE-RICH / MINI-MODE MIX / BALANCED). Each step shows index, rarity-coloured glyph, name, and a one-line tag. NEW: clicking a difficulty card no longer opens immediately — a PICK YOUR SHIP screen appears with all 4 class tiles (locked ones show UNLOCKS AT LV X). Energy is only spent after you confirm the ship; CANCEL drops back to picker. Ship is LOCKED for the rift duration — CLASS page refuses to switch active_class while a rift is active. Windows only.
